---
title: "eindevaluatie_thesis"
author: "Ilse Hamers"
date: "2026-06-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# README
Script to analyse the survey results of the final validation

## Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(irr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ordinal)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
```

# data
```{r}
data_dir <- Sys.getenv("ANEMIA_DATA_DIR", unset = "data")

pad_mapping <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_clinical_validation_Eindevaluatie_step_mapping.csv")
export_pad <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\ANEMIA-LLM_Eindevaluatie_export_20260613.csv")

df_map <- read.csv(pad_mapping) %>%
  mutate(UniekLabnummer = str_extract(case_raw, "\\d+")) %>%
  distinct(casus_nr, UniekLabnummer)
df_wide <- read_csv2(export_pad)
```
```{r}
df_wide <- df_wide %>%
  mutate(beoordelaar = case_when(
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110006 ~ "B1",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110007 ~ "B2",
    `Castor Participant ID` == 110008 ~ "B3",
  )) %>%
  select(-`Castor Participant ID`)
```

# wide to long, neater labels
```{r}
score_cols_likert <- names(df_wide)[str_detect(
  names(df_wide),
  "^eindevaluatie_casus\\d+_[abc]_(correctheid|nuance|databasering|format|taalgebruik)$"
)]

df_lang <- df_wide %>%
  select(beoordelaar, all_of(score_cols_likert)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(score_cols_likert),
               names_to = "variabele",
               values_to = "score") %>%
  mutate(
    casus_nr = as.integer(str_extract(variabele, "(?<=casus)\\d+")),
    letter = str_extract(variabele, "casus\\d+_([abc])_", group = 1),
    factor = str_extract(variabele, "[^_]+$")
  ) %>%
  select(beoordelaar, casus_nr, letter, factor, score) %>%
  left_join(df_map, by = "casus_nr")

df_lang <- df_lang %>%
  mutate(
    bron = case_when(
      letter == "a" ~ "Decision tree",
      letter == "b" ~ "Human expert",
      letter == "c" ~ "LLM"
    ),
    factor = case_when(
      factor == "correctheid" ~ "Clinical correctness",
      factor == "nuance" ~ "Nuance",
      factor == "databasering" ~ "Hallucination",
      factor == "format" ~ "Format",
      factor == "taalgebruik" ~ "Language"
    )
  )

factor_volgorde <- c("Clinical correctness", "Nuance", "Hallucination", "Format", "Language")
bron_volgorde   <- c("Decision tree", "Human expert", "LLM")

df_lang <- df_lang %>%
  mutate(
    factor = factor(factor, levels = factor_volgorde),
    bron   = factor(bron, levels = bron_volgorde),
    score  = as.integer(score)
  )

print(table(df_lang$bron, df_lang$factor))
```

# ICC
```{r}
factoren <- levels(df_lang$factor)

icc_per_factor <- map_dfr(factoren, function(f) {

  mat_f <- df_lang %>%
    filter(factor == f) %>%
    mutate(item_id = paste(UniekLabnummer, bron, sep = "_")) %>%
    select(beoordelaar, item_id, score) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = beoordelaar, values_from = score) %>%
    select(B1, B2, B3)

  a_s <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "agreement",   unit = "single")
  a_a <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "agreement",   unit = "average")
  c_s <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "consistency", unit = "single")
  c_a <- icc(mat_f, model = "twoway", type = "consistency", unit = "average")

  tibble(
    factor = f,
    `ICC(A,1)` = round(a_s$value, 3),
    `ICC(A,1) CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", a_s$lbound, a_s$ubound),
    `ICC(A,k)` = round(a_a$value, 3),
    `ICC(A,k) CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", a_a$lbound, a_a$ubound),
    `ICC(C,1)` = round(c_s$value, 3),
    `ICC(C,1) CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", c_s$lbound, c_s$ubound),
    `ICC(C,k)` = round(c_a$value, 3),
    `ICC(C,k) CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", c_a$lbound, c_a$ubound)
  )
})
print(icc_per_factor)
```

# plots per factor (not used in thesis) and cumulative
```{r}
bron_kleuren <- c(
  "Decision tree" = "#e08282",
  "Human expert"  = "#bc4242",
  "LLM"           = "#2c3e50"
)

for (f in factoren) {
  df_sub <- df_lang %>% filter(factor == f)

  p <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = bron, y = score, fill = bron)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 1.5) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2.5, fill = "white") +
    labs(title = paste("Scores per source for:", f), x = "Source", y = "Score") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = bron_kleuren) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "none") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = 1:5)

  print(p)
}

df_totaal <- df_lang %>%
  group_by(beoordelaar, casus_nr, UniekLabnummer, bron) %>%
  summarise(totaalscore = sum(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_totaal <- ggplot(df_totaal, aes(x = bron, y = totaalscore, fill = bron)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 1.5) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2.5, fill = "white") +
  labs(title = "Total cumulative score by conclusion source",
       x = "Source", y = "Total Score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bron_kleuren) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.position  = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(5, 25, by = 2))

print(p_totaal)
```
# (C)LMM
```{r}
clmm_resultaten <- list()

for (f in factoren) {
  df_sub <- df_lang %>%
    filter(factor == f) %>%
    mutate(score = factor(score, ordered = TRUE))

  cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  cat("Factor:", f, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")

  model <- clmm(
    score ~ bron + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
    data = df_sub,
    link = "logit"
  )

  clmm_resultaten[[f]] <- model
  print(summary(model))
}
```
```{r}
df_totaal_lmm <- df_lang %>%
  group_by(beoordelaar, casus_nr, UniekLabnummer, bron) %>%
  summarise(totaalscore = sum(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

model_totaal_lmm <- lmer(
  totaalscore ~ bron + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
  data = df_totaal_lmm
)

summary(model_totaal_lmm)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(fitted(model_totaal_lmm), resid(model_totaal_lmm),
     xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", main = "Residuals vs Fitted")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2)
qqnorm(resid(model_totaal_lmm), main = "Q-Q plot residuals")
qqline(resid(model_totaal_lmm), col = "red")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# emmeans
```{r}
# Per factor
for (f in factoren) {
  cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  cat("Post-hoc:", f, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")

  emm_bron <- emmeans(clmm_resultaten[[f]], ~ bron, mode = "latent")
  print(pairs(emm_bron, adjust = "bonferroni"))
}

# Totaal
em_bron <- emmeans(model_totaal_lmm, pairwise ~ bron, adjust = "bonferroni")
print(em_bron$emmeans)
print(em_bron$contrasts)
```

# ranking
```{r}
rank_cols <- names(df_wide)[str_detect(
  names(df_wide),
  "^eindevaluatie_casus\\d+_rank_[abc]$"
)]

df_rank <- df_wide %>%
  select(beoordelaar, all_of(rank_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(rank_cols),
               names_to = "variabele", values_to = "rang") %>%
  mutate(
    casus_nr = as.integer(str_extract(variabele, "(?<=casus)\\d+")),
    letter   = str_extract(variabele, "[abc]$"),
    bron = case_when(
      letter == "a" ~ "Decision tree",
      letter == "b" ~ "Human expert",
      letter == "c" ~ "LLM"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(df_map, by = "casus_nr") %>%
  mutate(bron = factor(bron, levels = bron_volgorde),
         rang = as.integer(rang)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(rang))

df_rank %>%
  group_by(beoordelaar, casus_nr) %>%
  summarise(ok = setequal(rang, 1:3), .groups = "drop") %>%
  count(ok)
```

```{r}
tabel_ranking <- df_rank %>%
  group_by(bron) %>%
  summarise(
    Gem_rang = round(mean(rang), 2),
    SD_rang = round(sd(rang), 2),
    Pct_1e = round(mean(rang == 1) * 100, 1),
    Pct_2e = round(mean(rang == 2) * 100, 1),
    Pct_3e = round(mean(rang == 3) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Gem_rang)

print(tabel_ranking)
```

# friedman
```{r}
rang_wide <- df_rank %>%
  mutate(blok = paste(beoordelaar, UniekLabnummer, sep = "_")) %>%
  select(blok, bron, rang) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = bron, values_from = rang) %>%
  select(-blok) %>%
  as.matrix()

friedman.test(rang_wide)

library(PMCMRplus)

rownames(rang_wide) <- paste0("blok_", seq_len(nrow(rang_wide)))

nemenyi <- PMCMRplus::frdAllPairsNemenyiTest(rang_wide)
nemenyi
```

# heatmap
```{r}
win_grid <- expand_grid(rij = bron_volgorde, kol = bron_volgorde) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(win = if (rij == kol) NA_real_
               else mean(rang_wide[, rij] < rang_wide[, kol], na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(rij = factor(rij, levels = rev(bron_volgorde)),
         kol = factor(kol, levels = bron_volgorde))

ggplot(win_grid, aes(kol, rij, fill = win)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.na(win), "", paste0(round(win * 100), "%"))), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2c3e50", mid = "white", high = "#bc4242",
                       midpoint = 0.5, limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "grey92",
                       labels = scales::percent, name = "Win rate") +
  labs(title = "Pairwise win rates between conclusion sources",
       x = "...ranked above...", y = NULL) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
```
